text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The other day during class, I heard someone's
stomach rumbling...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I didn't know who it was, but I was so worried
about them...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So after class, I gave out the cookies I'd made to
everyone. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Whether your stomach's grumbly or not,
eeeveryone gets a piece of buono! ☆
